properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There are two roads you may take One by sight, one by faith Take the Word of God or what you see, What you believe is what will be.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Set your wings to the winds of faith You can fly in a higher place. Do not struggle, it's by grace. Set your wings to the winds of faith

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: What's your need, what's your cry, What's your mountain much too high. Speak the Word of God, and by and by, It will move or you will fly.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Watch the eagle in the sky, He does not struggle, he does not strive. For the power that makes him rise, is already in the sky.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Do not struggle, for it s by Grace, Set your wings to the winds of Faith Set your wings to the winds of Faith
